name: Undeterred Capital
notes: Founded 2020, focuses on biological platforms and applied robotics. LA headquarters confirmed across multiple sources.

name: Topology
notes: Founded 2024 by Casey Caruso. Miami Beach confirmed by PitchBook and Tracxn; one source listed San Francisco (appears outdated). $75M Fund I closed Dec 2024.

name: Cannage Capital - Backing early-stage visionary founders
notes: Founded 2024, headquartered in Las Vegas, NV. Focuses on AI stack, cybersecurity, biotech, healthtech, fintech.

name: Asylum Ventures
notes: Founded 2024 by Nicholas Chirls. Brooklyn-based, raised $55M. Early-stage, pre-seed/seed focus.

name: Immad
notes: Immad Akhund (Mercury CEO). $26M debut fund closed May 2025. San Francisco confirmed across multiple sources.

name: Creator Ventures
notes: Headquartered in Wimbledon, London, UK. Co-founded by Sasha Kaletsky and Caspar Lee. $65M AUM, Fund II raised May 2025. Non-US HQ.

name: Browder Capital
notes: Founded 2020 by Joshua Browder (DoNotPay founder). Solo-GP pre-seed fund. San Francisco confirmed across multiple sources.

name: Eberg Capital
notes: Founded 2022 by Roger Ehrenberg and sons (Andrew, Ethan). Sports-focused VC (teams, betting, data, tech). New York HQ confirmed.

name: Julianshapiro
notes: Julian Shapiro, angel investor / GP at Julian Capital. San Francisco confirmed across multiple investor databases.

name: Cory Levy
notes: Cory Levy, angel investor and founder of Z Fellows and FirstText. San Francisco confirmed across multiple sources.

name: Engineering Capital
notes: Founded 2015 by Ashmeet Sidana. Seed fund for software infrastructure startups. Primary HQ: 745 Burgoyne St, Mountain View, CA. Some sources list Menlo Park (3000 Sand Hill Rd) as alternate address.

name: 零一创投 01VC
notes: Chinese early-stage VC founded 2014, headquartered in Shanghai with operations in Beijing. Non-US HQ.
